vectors.name: empty
vectors.description: Empty input → empty output → SHA-256 of empty string.

vectors.name: single-lf
vectors.description: Input is a single LF byte (0x0A). Output unchanged.

vectors.name: single-cr
vectors.description: Input is a single CR byte (0x0D). Output should be LF (0x0A).

vectors.name: ascii-no-newline
vectors.description: Pure ASCII with no trailing newline. Output identical to input.

vectors.name: ascii-with-lf
vectors.description: ASCII line ending in LF. Output identical to input.

vectors.name: bom-only
vectors.description: Input is exactly the UTF-8 BOM. Output is empty after stripping.

vectors.name: bom-then-ascii
vectors.description: BOM + ASCII. BOM stripped; ASCII preserved.

vectors.name: embedded-bom-preserved
vectors.description: BOM in the middle of the file is the zero-width no-break space U+FEFF and MUST be preserved (only the LEADING BOM is stripped).

vectors.name: crlf-to-lf
vectors.description: CRLF becomes LF.

vectors.name: lone-cr-to-lf
vectors.description: Lone CR (not followed by LF) becomes LF.

vectors.name: mixed-line-endings
vectors.description: Mix of CRLF, LF, lone CR. All CR sequences become LF.

vectors.name: only-cr-bytes
vectors.description: Input is exactly three CR bytes. Output should be three LF bytes.

vectors.name: already-nfc
vectors.description: Text already in NFC. Output identical to input.

vectors.name: nfd-to-nfc-acute
vectors.description: NFD form U+0065 U+0301 (e + combining acute) → NFC U+00E9 (é).

vectors.name: nfd-multiple-diacritics
vectors.description: Multiple NFD sequences compose to their NFC equivalents.

vectors.name: nfc-non-composable
vectors.description: NFD sequence that has no precomposed form. NFC leaves it as-is (no information loss).

vectors.name: zwsp-preserved
vectors.description: Zero-width space (U+200B) is preserved — removing it would mask tampering.

vectors.name: zwj-zwnj-preserved
vectors.description: Zero-width joiner (U+200D) and non-joiner (U+200C) preserved.

vectors.name: nbsp-preserved
vectors.description: Non-breaking space (U+00A0) preserved.

vectors.name: rtl-ltr-overrides-preserved
vectors.description: Bidi override characters preserved (security-sensitive but stripping is worse).

vectors.name: homoglyphs-preserved
vectors.description: Visually identical Latin and Cyrillic letters preserved as distinct codepoints.

vectors.name: trailing-spaces-preserved
vectors.description: Trailing spaces on lines preserved (Fountain semantics).

vectors.name: tabs-preserved
vectors.description: Tab characters preserved (no conversion to spaces).

vectors.name: blank-lines-preserved
vectors.description: Empty lines and their counts preserved (Fountain delimiter semantics).

vectors.name: final-newline-present
vectors.description: A file ending in LF produces a hash that includes that LF.

vectors.name: final-newline-absent
vectors.description: A file NOT ending in LF produces a DIFFERENT hash than one that does.

vectors.name: fountain-scene-heading
vectors.description: Fountain INT./EXT. scene heading; ASCII only, no transforms needed.

vectors.name: fountain-dialogue
vectors.description: Fountain character + dialogue with smart quotes (already NFC).

vectors.name: fountain-with-crlf
vectors.description: Fountain content saved by a Windows tool (CRLF line endings).

vectors.name: fountain-with-bom-and-crlf
vectors.description: Fountain content saved by Windows Notepad (BOM + CRLF).

vectors.name: combined-bom-crlf-nfd
vectors.description: BOM + CRLF + NFD all at once — exercises all transforms.

vectors.name: unicode-supplementary
vectors.description: Supplementary plane characters (emoji) preserved correctly.

vectors.name: large-1mb
vectors.description: ~1 MB of repeated ASCII content. Performance + correctness sanity check.

vectors.name: invalid-overlong-null
vectors.description: Overlong encoding of U+0000 as 0xC0 0x80 — rejected per RFC 3629 strict.

vectors.name: invalid-lone-continuation
vectors.description: Lone continuation byte 0x80 with no leading byte.

vectors.name: invalid-truncated-multibyte
vectors.description: 3-byte sequence indicator 0xE0 with only 1 continuation byte.

vectors.name: invalid-surrogate
vectors.description: Encoded high surrogate U+D800 (0xED 0xA0 0x80) — rejected.

vectors.name: invalid-codepoint-too-large
vectors.description: Encoded codepoint U+110000 (0xF4 0x90 0x80 0x80) > U+10FFFF — rejected.

vectors.name: invalid-5byte-attempt
vectors.description: 5-byte sequence indicator (0xF8) is not valid in UTF-8.

vectors.name: invalid-stray-c1
vectors.description: Stray leading byte 0xC1 (would always produce overlong).
